productDisplayName: Clarks Women Balti Zing Beige Heels
description: For a subtle stamp of sophistication, this pair of heels with patent leather uppers from clarks are the best bet. Styled in understated tones, classic cuts and a surprising bow embellishment on the front, this shoe nails all of this season's hottest trends. These shoes are the foundation of a chic city wardrobe. Wear this with understated dressy ensembles. Heel: 2.5" Upper Patent leather upper with a pointed toe box Slip-on style for ease of wear Padded synthetic leather footbed Outsole TPR outsole with terraced grooves on the midfoot Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
